nodes.label: Approval Chain Integration Tests  This module contains integration tests for the
Test cases for ApprovalChain creation and configuration.          Validates that
Create a basic approval chain with single sequential node.
Create an approval chain with multiple sequential levels.
Create an approval chain with parallel approval nodes.
Approval chain must have at least one approval node.
Test cases for ApprovalChain activation and workflow initialization.          Va
Set up test fixtures for each test method.
Activating a chain should set the first node as active.
Activating a chain should update the workorder state.
Activating an already active chain should raise an error.
Test cases for sequential approval node progression.          Validates that in
Set up test fixtures with sequential approval chain.
Approving the first node should advance to the second node.
Approving the second node should advance to the third node.
Approving the final node should complete the entire chain.
Cannot approve a non-active node in sequential mode.
Test cases for parallel approval (sign-off) node processing.          Validates
Set up test fixtures with parallel approval chain.
Approving only one parallel node should not advance the chain.
All parallel nodes approved should advance to next sequential node.
Test cases for approval rejection workflow.          Validates that rejected app
Rejecting a node should mark the chain as rejected.
Rejecting should update workorder state to REJECTED.
Test cases for approval delegation functionality.          Validates that approv
Delegation should change the current approver of the node.
Delegation should be recorded in approval history.
Test cases for approval history tracking.          Validates that all approval a
Each approval action should be recorded in history.
Rejection should be recorded in history.
All history records should include timestamps.
Integration tests for state machine and approval chain interaction.          Val
Workorder state should transition to APPROVAL_IN_PROGRESS on chain activation.
Workorder state should transition to APPROVED when chain completes.
Workorder state should transition to REJECTED when chain is rejected.
Integration tests for ApprovalChainService operations.          Tests the high-l
Should be able to create and retrieve an approval chain.
Should filter chains by workorder type.
Should be able to delete an inactive chain.
Integration tests for the main ApprovalService.          Tests the approval work
Submitting a workorder should create and activate an approval chain.
Approving a workorder should advance the approval chain.
Rejecting a workorder should require a reason.
Provides a mock database session for tests.
Provides a sample sequential approval chain for testing.
Provides a sample parallel approval chain for testing.
Provides a sample workorder for testing.
